name: Red Pepper "Letcho
recipeIngredient: 1 pound red bell pepper, cut into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the oil and paprika in a 13 x 9 x 2-inch oval dish. Cook uncovered at 100% for 1 minute. Stir in the onions, coating them with the paprika and oil mixture. Cook uncovered for 6 minutes.
2. Remove from the microwave oven. Stir the onions and mound the peppers on top. Cover tightly with plastic wrap. Cook for 8 minutes. Prick the plastic to release steam.
3. Remove from the oven and uncover. Stir well and cook uncovered for 6 minutes. Stir in the tomato paste and cook uncovered for 18 minutes, stirring twice.
